questions.question: Which AI-related skill is most useful for improving workplace productivity?
In an AI-assisted workplace, why is critical thinking important?
options: To verify AI outputs for errors

questions.question: What is the best way to use AI tools ethically at work?
options: Hide use of AI from team
Check facts and cite sources when needed
Use AI to copy confidential data

questions.question: Which employability skill improves when using AI for team projects?

options: Report and validate with trusted sources

questions.question: Why is data literacy valuable for AI employability?
options: It removes the need for learning
